zh.lifeSummary: Lucia de Humet是Jean de Hummet和Unknown的女兒，於1202年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可舒寧咸。她和Richard de Grey至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1282年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾可德諾享年80歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾可德諾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lucia de Humet是Jean de Hummet和Unknown的女儿，于1202年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可舒寧咸。她和Richard de Grey至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1282年在英国英格兰德比夏爾可德諾享年80岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾可德諾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Humet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a pet form of the personal name   Hue   or   Hugues  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Hewlett
meanings: English (Gloucestershire and Somerset): variant of   Howlett  . This surname is also established in Ireland (mainly Tipperary).

nameMeanings.name: Lucia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the old Roman given name Lucius, which is probably a derivative of Latin lux ‘light’. The girl's name is common in Italy and elsewhere, and is found as a learned, Latinate doublet of Lucy in England. St Lucia of Syracuse, who was martyred in 304 , was a very popular saint in the Middle Ages; she is often represented in medieval art as blinded and with her eyes on a platter, but the tradition that she had her eyes put out is probably based on nothing more than the association between light and eyes.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Lucia de Humet was born in 1202, in Sheringham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Jean de Hummet and Unknown. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Richard de Grey. She died in 1282, in Codnor, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80, and was buried in Codnor, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lucia de Humet est née en 1202, à Sheringham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Jean de Hummet et Unknown. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Richard de Grey. Elle est décédée en 1282, à Codnor, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Codnor, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Lucia de Humet wurde 1202 in Sheringham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Jean de Hummet und Unknown geboren. Sie hatte mit Richard de Grey mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1282 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Codnor, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Codnor, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Lucia de Humet è nata il nel 1202 nel Sheringham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Jean de Hummet e Unknown. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Richard de Grey. Morì nel 1282, nel Codnor, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolta a Codnor, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucia de Humetは1202年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクシェリンガムでJean de HummetとUnknownの娘として生まれた。彼女はRichard de Greyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1282年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアコドノーで80歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアコドノーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucia de Humet(은)는 1202년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 셔잉함에서 Jean de Hummet(와)과 Unknown의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Richard de Grey(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1282년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 코드너에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 코드너에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lucia de Humet nasceu em 1202, em Sheringham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Jean de Hummet e Unknown. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Richard de Grey. Ela faleceu em 1282, em Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Lucia de Humet родилась в 1202 г. в местности ширингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Jean de Hummet и Unknown. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Richard de Grey. Она умерла в 1282 г. в местности коднор, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности коднор, дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Lucia de Humet nació en 1202, en Sheringham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Jean de Hummet y Unknown. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Richard de Grey. Murió en 1282, en Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
